idea-plugin.name: EnigmAgent Vault
idea-plugin.description:
EnigmAgent Vault — Secure AI Agent Credential Manager

Store API keys, tokens, and passwords in a local AES-256-GCM encrypted vault. Reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}} symbols in AI prompts, HTTP clients, and run configurations — the vault resolves them automatically at execution time.

Features

  • 🔒 Local AES-256-GCM vault — no cloud, no telemetry
  • 🤖 {{PLACEHOLDER}} resolution for AI agent tool calls
  • 🔗 Integrates with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, n8n, and 40+ frameworks
  • 🛡 Domain-binding: each secret is bound to a specific origin
  • ⚡ Works in HTTP client, run configurations, and terminal

Quick Start

  1. Install EnigmAgent MCP: npm install -g enigmagent-mcp
  2. Start the vault server: enigmagent-mcp --mode rest --port 3737
  3. Add a secret via the tool window or CLI
  4. Reference it as {{SECRET_NAME}} in any HTTP request or run config

Documentation | Support
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 1.0.0: Initial release — vault integration for JetBrains IDEs

action.description: Check if EnigmAgent vault is running and unlocked
